command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.202 "cat > /tmp/fix_hermes5.sh << 'SHEOF'
#!/bin/bash
cd /home/jose/.hermes/hermes-agent

# Install with yes fed to stdin
printf 'Y
Y
' | sudo /home/jose/.hermes/hermes-agent/venv/bin/hermes gateway install --system --run-as-user jose --force 2>&1
echo install_exit=0
sleep 5

# Check
sudo systemctl status hermes-gateway --no-pager | head -12
ss -tlnp | grep 9119 || echo port_not_open
SHEOF
bash /tmp/fix_hermes5.sh"
